seo.title: Company - About VoiceAI
seo.description: Learn about our mission to transform customer conversations with AI voice technology.

hero.title: Transforming Customer Conversations
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to make every customer interaction natural, efficient, and delightful.

about.title: Our Story
about.description1: Founded in 2024, VoiceAI is building the future of customer communication. We believe that every customer deserves a helpful, natural conversation - whether they're talking to a human or an AI.
about.description2: Our team of AI researchers, engineers, and customer experience experts are passionate about creating technology that genuinely helps businesses and their customers.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: The people behind the technology.
team.ceoBio: Former VP at major tech company with 15+ years in AI.
team.ctoBio: PhD in Machine Learning, ex-Google AI researcher.
team.cooBio: Operations leader with background in scaling startups.
team.vpBio: Product veteran from leading SaaS companies.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: We're looking for talented people to help us build the future.

seo.title: Contact Us - VoiceAI
seo.description: Get in touch with VoiceAI. Contact our sales team, customer support, or visit our office.

contact.title: Get in Touch
